plants.subtitle: All tracked plants and their latest status

apiKeys.title: Ingestion API keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Issue and revoke keys used by edge devices to push detections
apiKeys.createHint: Keys authenticate the sync server's detection ingest. The owner must be an existing agriculture user.
apiKeys.createError: Couldn't create the key. Check the owner and name.
apiKeys.noAgricultureUsers: No agriculture users exist yet. Create one (register a user and assign the agriculture role) before issuing a key.
apiKeys.createdHint: Copy this key now — it is shown only once and cannot be retrieved later.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Create and manage field (agriculture) users
users.createHint: Creates a login already assigned the agriculture role — ready to own plants and receive ingestion keys.
users.createError: Couldn't create the user. The email may already exist or the password is too weak (8+ chars, upper, lower, digit).

treatment.subtitle: Bio-first protocol

desc.trichoderma: Apply 2g/L foliar spray. Works against 9 of 9 tomato disease classes.
desc.chlorothalonil: Use if spread exceeds 3+ rows. Use protective gear.

landing.title: Catch plant disease before it spreads.
landing.lede: AgriCure watches your greenhouse in real time. Edge cameras and on-device AI spot disease on every plant, keep a full health history, and recommend the right treatment, so you act early, not after the damage is done.
landing.featuresSub: AgriCure offers real-time disease detection, full plant health history, smart bio-first treatments and 8-disease coverage — all in one system.
landing.howSub: From field scan to treatment record — three simple steps keep your crop healthy.

s1.title: Scan the rows
s1.desc: ZED 2 stereo cameras on the moving stand stream every row of the greenhouse in real time.

s2.title: Detect on-device
s2.desc: A YOLOv8 model flags disease per plant with a confidence score, severity and the affected leaf area.

s3.title: Act early
s3.desc: Get a bio-first treatment recommendation, apply it, and track each plant's health on its passport.

landing.diseases: Detects 8 tomato diseases — late & early blight, fusarium wilt, powdery mildew, bacterial spot, leaf mold, septoria leaf spot and spider mites.

f1.title: Live detection
f1.desc: ZED 2 cameras stream the rows; YOLOv8 flags disease with confidence and location in real time.

f2.title: Plant passports
f2.desc: Every plant gets a health timeline — scans, severity trends and the treatments applied to it.

f3.title: Smart treatments
f3.desc: Bio-first recommendations per disease, plus a record of what was applied and when.

f4.title: 8 diseases
f4.desc: Late & early blight, fusarium wilt, powdery mildew, bacterial spot and more.

login.signInSub: Sign in to the disease detection dashboard
login.registerSub: Start monitoring your crops with AI

desc.allHealthy: All plants healthy · No issues detected
